description: Regression corpus: real-world and generated MARC inputs that once caused mrrc to mishandle a record (panic, hang, silent data loss, or a wrong/opaque error). Each committed input is a permanent regression guard. See README.md for the invariant and the provenance schema.

records.crash_summary: directory entry for 001 points to offset 99999, past end of record
records.expected_behavior: no panic; parse error or recovery, no crash
records.notes: Synthetic bootstrap seed for the regression intake pipeline (bd-ndx); mirrors malformed.rs dir_past_end.
